plugins.name: humble-task-force
plugins.description: Humble Task Force — a portable product-owner↔manager↔developer pipeline for Claude Code with two review gates: frame a feature's intent as a brief, absorb it and plan the build, draft the ticket against it, sign off the plan (Gate 1), execute with a training/Q&A step, hand off from the real git diff, and review the code against acceptance criteria (Gate 2).
